meta.description: Weekly check for stale knowledge: decisions past review date, constraints/tribal not verified in 90/180 days. Sends summary email every Monday.

parameters.query: SELECT id, title, domain, department, review_date, last_reviewed_at, CURRENT_DATE - review_date as days_overdue FROM knowledge.decisions WHERE status = 'active' AND review_date IS NOT NULL AND review_date < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY days_overdue DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, title, domain, constraint_type, last_verified_at, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - last_verified_at)::INTEGER as days_since_verified FROM knowledge.constraints WHERE still_valid = TRUE AND last_verified_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY days_since_verified DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT id, title, domain, knowledge_type, last_verified_at, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - last_verified_at)::INTEGER as days_since_verified FROM knowledge.tribal WHERE last_verified_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' ORDER BY days_since_verified DESC LIMIT 50

conditions.leftValue: ={{ $('Get Stale Decisions').item.json.length + $('Get Stale Constraints').item.json.length + $('Get Stale Tribal').item.json.length }}
